data.title: dotfiles: deploy x11 config
data.description:
Sub-issue of #12

Add ansible tasks to deploy X11 config.

**Files:** `roles/03-dotfiles/files/.config/x11/`

* xinitrc

**Tasks:**

- [ ] Ensure x11 config directory exists
- [ ] Symlink xinitrc
- [ ] Test deployment with `./run.sh`
